homepage.heroSubline: G&J Construction delivers unmatched quality and durability. Serving Dallas-Fort Worth with pride and precision.
aboutText: G&J Construction started with a simple goal: to provide reliable, long-lasting paving solutions to the people of Arlington and the surrounding areas. Founded by two brothers with a passion for quality craftsmanship, we’ve grown from a small family operation to a trusted name in the DFW paving industry.

Our approach is straightforward: we use the best materials, employ skilled professionals, and maintain open communication with our clients throughout every project. We believe in doing the job right the first time, ensuring your satisfaction and the longevity of our work.

We're deeply rooted in the Arlington community. We understand the unique challenges our Texas climate presents, from scorching summers to occasional ice storms, and we build our pavements to withstand it all. We're committed to contributing to the growth and beauty of our neighborhoods.

valueProps.title: Unwavering Quality
valueProps.description: We use only the highest-grade materials and proven techniques to ensure lasting results.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise
valueProps.description: We understand the specific needs of DFW properties, from soil conditions to weather patterns.

valueProps.title: Transparent Communication
valueProps.description: We keep you informed every step of the way, providing clear timelines and honest assessments.

valueProps.title: Guaranteed Satisfaction
valueProps.description: We stand behind our work and are dedicated to exceeding your expectations.

homepage.ctaSubline: Contact G&J Construction today to discuss your project needs.

services.name: Asphalt Paving
services.shortDescription: Durable and cost-effective asphalt paving for driveways, parking lots, and more.
services.description:
Asphalt paving is a versatile and economical solution for a wide range of applications. At G&J Construction, we specialize in providing top-quality asphalt paving services for residential, commercial, and industrial properties throughout the Dallas-Fort Worth area. Our experienced team handles everything from initial site preparation and grading to asphalt installation and compaction, ensuring a smooth, durable, and long-lasting surface. 

We understand the unique challenges posed by the Texas climate, and we tailor our asphalt mixes to withstand extreme heat, heavy rainfall, and freeze-thaw cycles. Whether you need a new driveway installed in North Arlington, a parking lot resurfaced in Fort Worth, or a private road paved in Plano, we have the expertise and equipment to get the job done right.

We offer a variety of asphalt paving options, including hot mix asphalt, warm mix asphalt, and porous asphalt. Our team will work with you to determine the best solution for your specific needs and budget. We also provide asphalt repair and maintenance services to extend the life of your existing pavement and prevent costly repairs down the road. With G&J Construction, you can be confident that your asphalt paving project will be completed on time, within budget, and to the highest standards of quality.

faq.question: How long does asphalt paving last?
faq.answer: With proper maintenance, asphalt paving can last 15-20 years or more.

faq.question: What is the best time of year for asphalt paving?
faq.answer: The best time for asphalt paving in Texas is typically during the spring or fall, when temperatures are moderate.

faq.question: How much does asphalt paving cost?
faq.answer: The cost of asphalt paving varies depending on the size of the project, the type of asphalt used, and site conditions. Contact us for a free estimate.

services.name: Concrete Paving
services.shortDescription: Durable and versatile concrete paving for driveways, patios, walkways, and foundations.
services.description:
G&J Construction delivers strong, reliable concrete paving solutions for Arlington and beyond. We're experts in pouring and finishing concrete for driveways, patios, walkways, foundations, and more. Concrete offers exceptional durability and versatility, making it an ideal choice for both residential and commercial properties.

Our team understands the importance of proper site preparation, reinforcement, and curing when it comes to concrete paving. We use high-quality concrete mixes and proven techniques to ensure a strong, crack-resistant surface that will withstand the test of time. We take into account the specific soil conditions and drainage needs of your property to prevent future problems.

Whether you're looking to add a decorative concrete patio to your backyard in South Arlington, install a new concrete driveway in Dalworthington Gardens, or pour a concrete foundation for a commercial building in Pantego, G&J Construction has the experience and expertise to handle the job. We offer a variety of concrete finishes, including stamped concrete, exposed aggregate, and broom finish. We can also incorporate decorative elements such as borders, patterns, and colors to create a unique and visually appealing surface. We're committed to delivering concrete paving solutions that are both functional and aesthetically pleasing.

faq.question: How long does concrete paving take to cure?
faq.answer: Concrete typically takes 28 days to fully cure, but it can be walked on after 24-48 hours.

faq.question: What is the best way to prevent concrete cracking?
faq.answer: Proper site preparation, reinforcement, and curing are essential to preventing concrete cracking.

faq.question: Can concrete be colored or stamped?
faq.answer: Yes, concrete can be colored and stamped to create a variety of decorative finishes.

services.name: Driveway Paving
services.shortDescription: Expert driveway paving services to enhance curb appeal and property value.
services.description:
Your driveway is one of the first things people notice about your home. A well-paved driveway not only enhances curb appeal but also provides a safe and convenient surface for parking and accessing your property. G&J Construction specializes in providing top-quality driveway paving services for homeowners throughout the Dallas-Fort Worth area.

We offer a variety of driveway paving options, including asphalt, concrete, and gravel. Our team will work with you to determine the best solution for your specific needs, budget, and aesthetic preferences. We take into account the size and shape of your driveway, the soil conditions, and the drainage needs to ensure a durable and long-lasting surface.

Whether you're looking to replace an old, cracked driveway or install a brand-new driveway on a new construction project, G&J Construction has the experience and expertise to handle the job. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure a smooth, even, and visually appealing surface. We also provide driveway repair and maintenance services to extend the life of your existing driveway and prevent costly repairs down the road. Let us help you create a driveway that you'll be proud of for years to come.

faq.question: How wide should my driveway be?
faq.answer: A standard driveway should be at least 10 feet wide to accommodate a single vehicle. A double-wide driveway should be at least 20 feet wide.

faq.question: What is the best material for a driveway in Texas?
faq.answer: Asphalt and concrete are both excellent choices for driveways in Texas, offering durability and resistance to extreme weather conditions.

faq.question: How often should I seal my asphalt driveway?
faq.answer: Asphalt driveways should be sealed every 2-3 years to protect them from the elements and prevent cracking.

services.name: Parking Lot Paving
services.shortDescription: Professional parking lot paving solutions for businesses of all sizes.
services.description:
A well-maintained parking lot is essential for any business. It provides a safe and convenient space for customers and employees to park their vehicles, while also enhancing the overall appearance of your property. G&J Construction specializes in providing top-quality parking lot paving services for businesses throughout the Dallas-Fort Worth area.

We offer a full range of parking lot paving services, including asphalt paving, concrete paving, and gravel paving. Our team will work with you to determine the best solution for your specific needs, budget, and traffic volume. We take into account the size and layout of your parking lot, the soil conditions, and the drainage needs to ensure a durable and long-lasting surface.

Whether you're looking to build a new parking lot for a new construction project or resurface an existing parking lot, G&J Construction has the experience and expertise to handle the job. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure a smooth, even, and visually appealing surface. We also provide parking lot repair and maintenance services, including crack sealing, pothole repair, and line striping, to keep your parking lot in top condition.

faq.question: How thick should asphalt be for a parking lot?
faq.answer: Asphalt for a parking lot should typically be 3-4 inches thick for light traffic and 4-6 inches thick for heavy traffic.

faq.question: What is the best way to maintain a parking lot?
faq.answer: Regular sweeping, crack sealing, and pothole repair are essential to maintaining a parking lot.

faq.question: How often should a parking lot be restriped?
faq.answer: A parking lot should be restriped every 1-2 years to ensure clear and visible parking spaces.

services.name: Sealcoating
services.shortDescription: Protective sealcoating services to extend the life of your asphalt pavement.
services.description:
Sealcoating is a cost-effective way to protect your asphalt pavement from the elements and extend its lifespan. At G&J Construction, we offer professional sealcoating services for residential and commercial properties throughout the Dallas-Fort Worth area. Sealcoating acts as a barrier against water, oil, UV rays, and other environmental factors that can damage asphalt over time.

Our team uses high-quality sealcoating products that are specifically designed for the Texas climate. We carefully prepare the asphalt surface by cleaning it thoroughly and repairing any cracks or potholes. Then, we apply a uniform layer of sealcoat using professional-grade equipment. The result is a smooth, black surface that not only looks great but also protects your asphalt pavement from further damage.

Sealcoating can prevent costly repairs down the road by preventing water from seeping into the asphalt and causing cracks. It also provides a slip-resistant surface and enhances the appearance of your property. Whether you have a driveway, parking lot, or private road, G&J Construction can provide the sealcoating services you need to keep your asphalt pavement in top condition. We recommend sealcoating every 2-3 years to maximize its benefits.

faq.question: How long does sealcoating take to dry?
faq.answer: Sealcoating typically takes 24-48 hours to dry completely.

faq.question: What is the best time of year to sealcoat?
faq.answer: The best time of year to sealcoat in Texas is typically during the spring or fall, when temperatures are moderate.

faq.question: How often should I sealcoat my asphalt?
faq.answer: Asphalt should be sealcoated every 2-3 years to maintain its protective properties.

services.name: Pavement Repair
services.shortDescription: Reliable pavement repair services to fix cracks, potholes, and other damage.
services.description:
Damaged pavement can be a safety hazard and a source of frustration. G&J Construction provides prompt and reliable pavement repair services to fix cracks, potholes, and other types of damage. We serve residential, commercial, and industrial properties throughout the Dallas-Fort Worth area. Ignoring pavement damage can lead to more extensive and costly repairs down the road, so it's important to address these issues promptly.

Our team has the expertise and equipment to handle a wide range of pavement repairs, from small crack filling to large-scale pothole patching. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure a durable and long-lasting repair. We carefully assess the damage and recommend the most appropriate repair solution for your specific situation. We understand the importance of minimizing disruption to your property and completing repairs quickly and efficiently. We also offer preventative maintenance services to help prevent future pavement damage.

Whether you have a cracked driveway in North Arlington, a pothole-ridden parking lot in Fort Worth, or a damaged private road in Plano, G&J Construction is here to help. We're committed to providing quality pavement repair services at competitive prices.

faq.question: How quickly should I repair a pothole?
faq.answer: Potholes should be repaired as soon as possible to prevent further damage and potential accidents.

faq.question: What is the best way to fill a crack in asphalt?
faq.answer: Cracks in asphalt should be filled with a hot-applied crack sealant to prevent water from seeping in.

faq.question: How can I prevent potholes from forming?
faq.answer: Regular sealcoating and proper drainage can help prevent potholes from forming.

serviceAreas.content:
G&J Construction is proud to offer our paving services to the residents and businesses of Dallas, Texas. From the historic neighborhoods filled with charming 1950s ranch homes to the bustling downtown area and beyond, we are committed to providing top-quality asphalt and concrete solutions. Dallas's hot, humid summers require durable paving materials that can withstand the elements, and G&J Construction has the expertise to deliver just that.

We understand the unique needs of Dallas property owners, whether it's repairing cracked driveways in established neighborhoods or installing new parking lots for commercial properties. Our team is dedicated to providing exceptional service and lasting results. We utilize the best materials and techniques to ensure your pavement stands the test of time.
serviceAreas.localContext: We understand the impact of Dallas's hot, humid summers on paving materials and tailor our services accordingly, especially in older neighborhoods with 1950s ranch style homes.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: G&J Construction did an outstanding job on our new driveway! They were professional from start to finish, and the quality of their work is exceptional. Our neighbors have all complimented us on how great it looks. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: We hired G&J Construction to repave our business parking lot. The team was efficient and minimized disruption to our customers. There were a couple minor hiccups with the initial striping layout, but they quickly corrected it to our satisfaction. Overall, a solid job.

reviews.name: Jessica R.
reviews.text: G&J Construction paved a new access road on our property. The work was completed on time and within budget. They were very responsive to our questions and concerns throughout the entire process. A pleasure to work with!

reviews.name: Robert B.
reviews.text: Excellent sealcoating service! Our driveway looks brand new again. The crew was professional and courteous, and they took great care to protect our landscaping. We'll definitely be using G&J Construction again in the future.

reviews.name: Ashley P.
reviews.text: G&J Construction poured a new concrete patio for us. The patio looks beautiful, and the quality of the work is top-notch. There was a slight delay due to weather, but they kept us informed every step of the way. Very happy with the results.

reviews.name: Kevin L.
reviews.text: Fast and reliable pavement repair service! G&J Construction fixed a large pothole in our driveway in no time. The repair is seamless, and you can't even tell there was ever a pothole there. Highly recommend their pavement repair services.
